deploy.startCommand: node -e "const mysql=require('mysql2/promise');mysql.createPool({host:process.env.DB_HOST,port:3306,user:process.env.DB_USER,password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD,database:process.env.DB_NAME}).query('DELETE FROM ecom_customers').then(([r])=>console.log('ecom_customers supprimés:',r.affectedRows)).catch(e=>console.error(e.message))" || true ; node scripts/create_all_ecom_tables.js || true ; node scripts/migrate_ecom_customers.js || true ; node server.js
